5.question: Which year did Audrey adopt the first three of her dogs?

memories.memory: 【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。
[October 28, 2023, 02:36 PM] Audrey: Hey Andrew, I

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. Audrey stated that all four dogs are mutts: two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that some dog breeds bond better than others. Audrey shared an image of a group of dogs tied to a leash on a brick walkway. Audrey then shared an image of three small dogs sitting on a couch with white fur. Andrew asked whether there are any other furry pals they play with, or just the ones Audrey has. Audrey answered: Just my fur babies, and shared an image of a dog and a teddy bear sleeping on a couch. 【Walks】September 24, 2023, 05:53 PM: Andrew asked Audrey, "Wow, teaching them tricks must be super fun! How often do you take them for walks?" Audrey replied, "Very often, multiple times a day even, it's a great exercise for them and great bonding time for us." [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs sitting next to each other on a beach]

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Audrey: Training Progress】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Audrey states she is taking a dog training course; it is challenging but rewarding, and her dogs are doing better already. At 08:32 PM, Andrew says that's great news; it must feel so rewarding to see them doing well; he understands how it feels on missing the peace of being out on the trails, but for now, it's just urban adventures then. At 08:32 PM, Audrey states that seeing them do well is super rewarding; they give me so much love and happiness; she gets how frustrating it can be not to find pet-friendly spots; nature is so calming and restorative with them around; see how happy they are when they're out. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth. 【Dog-friendly Spots】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew stated that he still can't find any dog-friendly spots to rent. Audrey stated at 08:32 PM that she hasn't had a ton of time for new trails either; the dog-training course has been a big time sink but it's paid off because they're doing great. 【Breeds: Jack Russell & Chihuahua】On July 3, 2023, at 08:32 PM, Andrew asked what breed the dogs are and what they enjoy doing the most. Audrey replied that they're all mutts, with two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that they love running and playing fetch; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs curled up in a dog bed. 【Doggy Playdates】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew observed that they look comfy in that bed and are clearly well loved, and asked how old they are and how they are getting along. Audrey replied that they're all 3-year-old and they are a great pack; they had a doggy playdate last Friday, and it was a bit crazy but still lots of fun; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs laying on a couch with a blanket. At 08:32 PM, Andrew commented that they look adorable, doggy playdates sound like a lot of fun, and that he is glad they all get along. 【Audrey: Personal Update】On July 03, 2023 at 08:32 PM, Audrey said: "They really are my universe." She asked: "What about anything new you've been into lately?"

【Audrey-Andrew Catch-Up】March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM: Audrey and Andrew exchanged messages. Andrew started a new job last week as a Financial Analyst, a change from his previous job. Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Dog Grooming】在 2023 年 8 月 19 日 21:19，Audrey 与 Andrew 就 Audrey 的狗狗美容进展展开对话。Audrey 表示八月很有事件性，她学会了新技能，开始自行为狗狗进行护理，确保它们被宠爱且开心，完成后它们看起来很可爱。她还发送了 grooming 完成后的照片，照片显示一只狗站在房间的桌子上，看起来柔软蓬松。Andrew 夸赞她的照护并请求再看一张 grooming 后的照片。Audrey 发送照片，指它们看起来又软又蓬松。Andrew 问她是如何做到如此出色，他说一直想学习狗狗美容但从未有时间。Audrey 回答说她参加过狗狗美容课程，学到了很多技巧，并问是否愿意听些技巧。Andrew 表示当然，愿意听。Audrey 给出技巧：grooming 要慢而温和，关注耳朵和爪子等敏感部位，并在整个过程保持耐心和积极态度。Andrew 表示这些技巧很实用，若有机会为 Toby 打理毛发就会记住这些。Audrey 回应说没问题，很高兴技巧对他有帮助，并表示如果他尝试，请告诉她，她可以提供更多建议。
[August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM] Audrey: Hi Andrew! The 【Park Walk】Park Walk。会话日期：August 19, 2023。2023年8月19日 09:19 PM，Audrey：我正带它们出去公园散步——它们很喜欢，且这对我们来说是很好的锻炼。你周末有什么计划？ 【Puppy Photos】Session Date: August 19, 2023; Timestamp: August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM; Speaker: Audrey. Audrey said: I can't wait for the pics. My dogs will be waiting too. An image shared by Audrey shows two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth.

【Dog Road Trips】On May 6, 2023 at 10:47 AM, Audrey described having a park near her that is great for her pup's walks, and that last Friday she took a road trip to a beautiful national park where her dogs had a blast; she shared an image of three dogs running through a field of grass. Andrew acknowledged that the pups had a great road trip and asked how often she takes them on road trips. Audrey replied that she takes them on road trips once every couple of months, a great way for them to explore and stay active. Andrew said that's awesome and that he wishes he could go on a road trip with a furry companion. Audrey added that it's a cool and amazing experience; having furry friends on a road trip is fun and exciting, and it's definitely something to look forward to. Andrew said he's adding it to his bucket list and can't wait for the day he actually goes on a trip with his dog.
[May 06, 2023, 10:47 AM] Audrey: That's a good

Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. 【Audrey & Andrew Sushi Journey】On October 24, 2023 at 10:14 AM, Andrew said he recently tried out this new spot in town that serves sushi and it was great, and he asked Audrey if there was anything she’d been wanting to try lately; Image shared by Andrew: a photo of a plate of sushi and vegetables on a table. Audrey replied that she’s feeling better each day and that the sushi looked phenomenal, and she knows what to get for dinner tonight. Andrew, who had been curious about trying sushi for a while and had never done it before, said he now understands the hype and asked if she had ever tried it; Image shared by Andrew: a photo of a tray of sushi with a variety of toppings. Audrey said sushi is delicious, there are many types and flavors to try, and urged trying different things; Don’t limit yourself in your comofort zone; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a long plate of sushi with sauce. Andrew said thanks for the tips and that he’s going with a California or salmon roll and trying out some sauces, and he’ll let her know how it goes; Image shared by Andrew: a photo of a person eating sushi on a wooden board. Now I’m gonna order some sushi for tonight. 【Audrey & Andrew Farewells】On October 24, 2023, at 10:14 AM, Andrew said, "Haha! You're welcomoe! 【Plants】October 04, 2023, 04:18 PM: Audrey: I get how it's like something is missing without being in the nature, but there are still some ways to appreciate it in the city, such as getting some plants for your place or taking a trip to the park on the weekends. Andrew: True; I should get some more plants for my house. Can't beat being outside tho, but they can still bring some peace. I'll look into it. Thanks for the tip! Glad to be of assistance."; Andrew said, "Oh you've helped so much."; Audrey said, "Haha i'm just doing what I can do to help." 【Dogs】Session Date: October 04, 2023. 【Audrey's Dogs – Hiking & Safety】On May 03, 2023 at 05:41 PM, Audrey stated that not much has changed since they last talked; she is busy taking care of her pets and spending time with them, and finds it fulfilling; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew asked whether Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes. Audrey stated that her dogs go nuts on hikes; they love exploring new scents and being in nature—it's their happy place; she can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it; it's so great to see them having so much fun; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. Andrew asked for tips or tricks for keeping dogs safe when they're out and about. Audrey stated that safety is super important for me; she even got them something special; they sure look funny, but it works; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog with a leash and shoes on. 【Audrey's Walks – Fetch & Socials】Session Date: May 03, 2023. May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Awesome to see that you take such good care of your dogs! What else do you do when you walk them? Audrey: When I take them out, we usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee. They love chasing it! We also meet other dog owners in the park and have a doggie playdate. It's a great way for me to chat with people and for them to make new friends. [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog catching a frisbee in a field] May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Wow, looks like fun! They sure look excited about playing fetch! Audrey: They absolutely adore it! They have tons of energy and love meeting new pals at playdates. Plus, they always get excited when I bring those out. [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog wearing a party hat sitting on a couch] 【Audrey's Playdates & Dog Park】会话日期：2023年5月3日，时间：17:41。Andrew 问：它们是否喜欢戴派对帽？以及你从哪里找到它们的玩耍约会。Audrey 回答：帽子并不打扰它们，它们戴帽子只是为了好玩和得到零食。狗公园是一个很好的起点，它们可以在那儿奔跑并与其他狗狗互动，是玩耍约会的有趣地点。Audrey 分享的图片：一张狗跳过公园环的照片。Andrew 问：它位于哪里？Audrey 回答：就在我们通常散步的公园旁边，那里有很多树和长椅，便于我们观看狗狗玩耍。Andrew 表示：那也不算太远吧！我得去看看。 【Audrey & Andrew – Closing Chat】Audrey and Andrew – Closing Chat; Session Date: May 03, 2023. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Audrey: Yup! Not at all! Let me know how it goes. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Andrew: Sure, I'll let you know. Always great chatting with you! Ttyl.

【Audrey & Andrew Weekend】[Audrey & Andrew Weekend]
[会话日期：2023年8月19日]

2023年8月19日21:19，Andrew 表示他昨天从工作中休息，去了一家新咖啡馆，感觉不错，想到大自然总能带来平静；他附上自己上一次徒步的照片，描述为“so serene”，照片为日落时的山景，山顶有一座教堂。他还问 Audrey 这个月过得如何，并宣布本周末将前往自然保护区以重新接触大自然，感到兴奋。Audrey 回应：不要忘了拍些好照片。 Andrew 回应：当然，我会拍一些很棒的照片给你看，等我回来再给你看；他还说自己真的很想把这一刻保存下来。Andrew 对 Audrey 表示感谢，计划回来的时候再展示这些照片。
[August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM] Andrew: Hey Audrey, ho

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Work Challenges】Session Date: September 06, 2023; 07:49 PM. Andrew reports that since the last talk, a few new things have come up in his life; work's been tough and stressful, so his outdoor activities have taken a backseat; balance is challenging. Audrey responds that it's good to hear from him; acknowledges that work is tough; notes that balance is challenging and there may not be enough time; advises taking care of oneself and finding ways to manage stress and encourages him to hang in there. 【Self-Care Practices】On September 06, 2023, at 07:49 PM, Andrew acknowledged that self-care is tough but part of life and asked how to ensure enough time for oneself. Audrey responded that it's tough to find time for yourself and that she makes sure to do at least one self-care activity each day, such as treating herself to something nice, adding "Don't forget to take care of yourself and have some fun too!". At 07:49 PM, Andrew noted that self-care is important and that he has been adding simple things to his day, such as grabbing a coffee in the morning or going for a walk at lunch, which helps him recharge and chill out.

【Content】Session Date: October 24, 2023; at 10:14 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend went to a wine tasting last weekend; it was great; they tried many unique wines and learned a lot; he was surprised at how much he enjoyed it; a reminder to step out of the comfort zone.

【Rock Climbing Experience】On June 13, 2023 at 05:23 PM, Andrew and friends took a rock climbing class; he reached the top, found it fantastic, and became hooked, planning to do more outdoor activities weekly. Audrey asked for pictures or videos from the climb. Andrew shared an image depicting the view from the top. Audrey commented that the view was stunning, congratulated him on reaching the top, and asked whether it was challenging to get there. Andrew replied that the climb was tricky since he is a newbie, but he completed it with the support and cheering of his friends. He stated that rock climbing was awesome and that reaching the top made him feel accomplished, and it has encouraged him to try more outdoor activities like kayaking and maybe bungee jumping, as nature pushes him out of his comfort zone. 【Support Network】Session Date: June 13, 2023. June 13, 2023, 05:23 PM: Audrey stated that having a solid support group really helps when things get tough and asked whether this adventure encourages you to try more outdoor activities.

【Beach】Session Date: October 04, 2023. At 04:18 PM, Andrew asked Audrey how the dogs enjoyed the beach and water and shared an image: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard. Audrey replied that the dogs had a blast swimming at the beach and asked if he had been there lately. Andrew admitted he hadn't been to the beach in a while, misses being outdoors, and finds it hard to find open spaces in the city; he used to hike a lot, but it's more challenging now with his work life balance. Audrey responded that that's rough and she can imagine how much he misses being outdoors and surrounded by nature. Andrew added that it's been tough; exploring nature was his escape, a way to find peace, but with his job and living there it's harder to get that feeling back, and he feels a void in his heart.

He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Plants】October 04, 2023, 04:18 PM: Audrey: I get how it's like something is missing without being in the nature, but there are still some ways to appreciate it in the city, such as getting some plants for your place or taking a trip to the park on the weekends. Andrew: True; I should get some more plants for my house. Can't beat being outside tho, but they can still bring some peace. I'll look into it. Thanks for the tip! Audrey: Of course; if you need help or advice, just let me know. Plants can make your home so peaceful. 【Audrey and Andrew: Thanks】October 04, 2023, 04:18 PM: Andrew said, "Thanks! I'll definitely reach out if I need any help or advice. Thanks again for offering!"; Audrey said, "No problem at all! Glad to be of assistance."; Andrew said, "Oh you've helped so much."; Audrey said, "Haha i'm just doing what I can do to help." 【Dogs】Session Date: October 04, 2023. At 04:18 PM, Andrew said, "Thank you really. Well, take care and say hi to your dogs for me," and Audrey replied, "Haha I will. Take care. Talk later!" Then at 04:18 PM, Andrew said, "Yup, have a great week," and Audrey replied, "Have a great week! Bye!"

【Dogs】2023年10月13日04:22 PM，Andrew 与 Audrey 的对话中包含以下要点：上周二（2023年10月10日），Andrew 和他的女友 Toby 一起度过了一个很棒的夜晚，玩桌游。Audrey 最近做了一些甜点，感谢邻居的狗友好环境，并问周末有何计划。Audrey 问能否带她的狗来，Andrew 表示不确定是否适合，但附近有一个很棒的狗公园，或许还能把咖啡带过去。Audrey 说狗公园对它们来说像天堂，喜欢和其他狗社交并大量运动，看到它们奔跑和嗅闻一切很可爱。Andrew 回忆道：有一次他的狗过于兴奋，追着松鼠在树周围奔跑，松鼠从树枝上观看，场面很搞笑。Audrey 问他的狗的品种，他说 Toby 是 German Shephard，且喜欢穿可爱的毛衣，非常活跃，并问对方的狗在公园喜欢玩哪些游戏。Audrey 回答她的狗最爱 Fetch 与 Frisbee，喜欢奔跑、结识其他狗，甚至可以跑好几个小时。Andrew 表示这听起来很有趣，看到它们快乐、活跃让人感到欣慰。Audrey 说看到它们快乐会让她心里充满喜悦，觉得它们带来无条件的爱；她还提到自己曾有四只狗的纹身，后来去纹身店在纹身上又添加了一些图案。Andrew 问她是否还会再养新狗或再纹身，Audrey 回答现在已经够了，除非未来某天决定再养一只狗，那时可能再纹一次。Andrew 指出这些狗确实是她的情感来源，给予灵感，他们也会被像这样的地方所启发；他提到一张路在树林中的照片作为灵感来源。Audrey 表示它们确实给她带来快乐，体验无条件的爱是美好的，并问 Andrew 是否有机会去像这样的森林散步，可能是一次很棒的逃离。Andrew 回应说他们与狗一起徒步是增进关系、创造回忆的有趣方式，Audrey 也表示她仍记得每次大家和狗一起走在徒步路上时的美好时光。

【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. 【Audrey's Pup Tattoo】会话标题：Audrey's Pup Tattoo；会话日期：April 16, 2023。在 2023年4月16日 04:19 PM 的对话中，Audrey 表示她对狗极为热爱，甚至在臂上纹了关于它们的纹身，图片显示她臂上的纹身为狗与向日葵；Andrew 评价纹身看起来很棒。Audrey 回答：谢谢！我是在一段时间以前纹的，它代表我对我的狗与自然之美的爱，并附有一张她带着狗在林中散步的照片。Andrew 问她为何要纹这个纹身。Audrey 表示她一直与它们有强烈的纽带，它们让我很开心，即使它们不在我身边，我也想看到它们开心的样子。Andrew 表示：那太棒了，我很高兴它们给你的生活带来如此多的快乐。

memories.memory: 【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). 【Outdoor Adventures with Dogs】[Outdoor Adventures with Dogs] 会话日期：2023年7月8日，09:48。Andrew表示，上周五和女友野餐很棒，置身自然让他感到 refresh 且产生快乐，附图为一张野餐桌上摆放各式零食和饮料的照片。Audrey回应，野餐听起来很棒，自然环境也很好，她的毛孩子总能让她开心，最近还进行了一次很棒的散步。Andrew补充，狗确实让生活更有乐趣，他想养狗但找住所和合适的狗困难，询问她是如何得到自己的狗的；附图为一只穿毛衣的狗坐在草地上。Audrey答称是通过附近的繁育者找到自己想要的狗，能养狗的地方确实很难找。Andrew说他找到了一些允许遛狗在 leash 的公园，但还没有开放区域让狗自由奔跑和玩耍；如找到，会通知 Audrey；附图为一群狗在公园奔跑。Audrey提出她也应该加入徒步，带上自己的狗，让它们有机会自由奔跑。Andrew表示当然愿意，与 Audrey及其毛孩子一起徒步，计划在下个月天气更宜人时进行，并提供他认为适合狗狗的徒步路线的地图；附图显示一名女子带着狗走在有海景的陡坡上。Audrey说那太棒了，期待带它们去徒步，希望找到一个风景优美、空间充足、供它们探索玩耍的地点。Andrew表示期待看到它们在徒步中玩得开心，并计划下个月动身，附地图的照片为一棵树木繁茂的公园地图。Audrey将着手研究适合自己毛孩子奔跑的步道。Andrew说听起来不错，确保步道对狗狗安全有保障。Audrey回应，安全是外出让狗儿奔跑时的首要任务。Andrew同意，认为和狗在一起会很棒。Audrey提到“今天会有一些很酷的事情发生”，附图为三只狗坐在地上系着牵引绳的照片。Andrew感叹它们看起来很可爱，似乎已经准备好冒险。Audrey回应，确实如此，它们已经为下一次户外冒险做好准备。Andrew说很期待见到它们，它们看起来很有活力。Audrey表示它们确实很有趣，外出时很有乐趣。Andrew说狗确实为日常生活增添许多乐趣。Audrey补充，它们给她带来极大喜悦，外出时永不无聊，并附两只在田野追逐球的照片。Andrew称它们在公园玩耍十分可爱，看到它们如此开心一定非常值得。Audrey回应，看它们如此快乐让她也非常开心。Andrew说它们的快乐具有传染力，光看照片就让他开心。Audrey说它们精力充沛，总是让人露出笑容。Andrew表示它们能让每个人都笑，迫不及待想和它们一起徒步。Audrey答道，和它们一起徒步一定会很棒，期待看它们在徒步中享受快乐。Andrew则表示他也等不及看到它们在徒步中玩得开心，感到非常兴奋。Audrey自信地说这一天将会非常美好，并展示本地公园中自己狗犬的开心样子照片。Andrew称它们很可爱，一定会是美好的一天，他也喜欢户外并乐于看到他人也在享受。Audrey补充，户外并看到人们快乐同样很棒，并附上一张去年的徒步日落照片，照片中有人站在山上望向天空。Andrew问这张日落在哪儿，Audrey回答这是去年她去的地方，距她家有3小时车程，日落非常惊艳。Andrew称这是很棒的日落和景色，尤其在自然环绕中。Audrey说这是一个美丽的瞬间，颜色鲜艳且感觉平静，她对这样的时刻心存感激，提醒自己要欣赏自然之美与珍惜小事，附日落时湖泊与山脉的照片。Andrew感叹自然能带来惊人景象，Audrey补充自然确有惊喜，所有鲜艳颜色带来平静感，令人屏息。Andrew认同，自然之美令人惊叹，若我们花时间欣赏这些时刻，生活也会很棒；Audrey回应，停下欣赏这些时刻确实会让生活更好。

【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。

【Audrey's Pup Tattoo】会话标题：Audrey's Pup Tattoo；会话日期：April 16, 2023。在 2023年4月16日 04:19 PM 的对话中，Audrey 表示她对狗极为热爱，甚至在臂上纹了关于它们的纹身，图片显示她臂上的纹身为狗与向日葵；Andrew 评价纹身看起来很棒。Audrey 回答：谢谢！我是在一段时间以前纹的，它代表我对我的狗与自然之美的爱，并附有一张她带着狗在林中散步的照片。Andrew 问她为何要纹这个纹身。Audrey 表示她一直与它们有强烈的纽带，它们让我很开心，即使它们不在我身边，我也想看到它们开心的样子。Andrew 表示：那太棒了，我很高兴它们给你的生活带来如此多的快乐。

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Dog Grooming】在 2023 年 8 月 19 日 21:19，Audrey 与 Andrew 就 Audrey 的狗狗美容进展展开对话。Audrey 表示八月很有事件性，她学会了新技能，开始自行为狗狗进行护理，确保它们被宠爱且开心，完成后它们看起来很可爱。她还发送了 grooming 完成后的照片，照片显示一只狗站在房间的桌子上，看起来柔软蓬松。Andrew 夸赞她的照护并请求再看一张 grooming 后的照片。Audrey 发送照片，指它们看起来又软又蓬松。Andrew 问她是如何做到如此出色，他说一直想学习狗狗美容但从未有时间。Audrey 回答说她参加过狗狗美容课程，学到了很多技巧，并问是否愿意听些技巧。Andrew 表示当然，愿意听。Audrey 给出技巧：grooming 要慢而温和，关注耳朵和爪子等敏感部位，并在整个过程保持耐心和积极态度。Andrew 表示这些技巧很实用，若有机会为 Toby 打理毛发就会记住这些。Audrey 回应说没问题，很高兴技巧对他有帮助，并表示如果他尝试，请告诉她，她可以提供更多建议。
[August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM] Audrey: Hi Andrew! Have you ever thought about joining? [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park] 【Toby & Buddy Care】On November 04, 2023, at 07:59 PM, Andrew said that seeing Toby and Buddy made him think about getting another dog, but he remained unsure; having two dogs is already a lot to take care of, and he asked for tips on being a multi-dog pet owner. Audrey advised focusing on Toby and Buddy first, stating that keeping them happy and healthy would be a good first step before expanding to more dogs. Andrew agreed, saying that was what he needed to hear and that he would take good care of his dogs first. Audrey offered help and stated that you don't need more dogs to make them happy, referencing an image she shared of two dogs playing with a frisbee in a park. 【Andrew & Audrey: City Dogs】November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM: Andrew states he has managed to make it work with dogs while still living in the city. Audrey notes that taking care of a pup in the city is tough but doable with the right approach, keeping them active is key, and shares a photo of how she entertains them in her house with toys and games (Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a basket full of stuffed animals on a wooden floor). Audrey lists activities: puzzles, training, hide-and-seek - they love it all! (Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog playing with a frisbee in a room). Andrew says he'll try those activities with his pups. Audrey says Let me know how it goes. Andrew says your advice and support really mean a lot to me.

【Outdoor Adventures with Dogs】[Outdoor Adventures with Dogs] 会话日期：2023年7月8日，09:48。Andrew表示，上周五和女友野餐很棒，置身自然让他感到 refresh 且产生快乐，附图为一张野餐桌上摆放各式零食和饮料的照片。Audrey回应，野餐听起来很棒，自然环境也很好，她的毛孩子总能让她开心，最近还进行了一次很棒的散步。Andrew补充，狗确实让生活更有乐趣，他想养狗但找住所和合适的狗困难，询问她是如何得到自己的狗的；附图为一只穿毛衣的狗坐在草地上。Audrey答称是通过附近的繁育者找到自己想要的狗，能养狗的地方确实很难找。Andrew说他找到了一些允许遛狗在 leash 的公园，但还没有开放区域让狗自由奔跑和玩耍；如找到，会通知 Audrey；附图为一群狗在公园奔跑。Audrey提出她也应该加入徒步，带上自己的狗，让它们有机会自由奔跑。Andrew表示当然愿意，与 Audrey及其毛孩子一起徒步，计划在下个月天气更宜人时进行，并提供他认为适合狗狗的徒步路线的地图；附图显示一名女子带着狗走在有海景的陡坡上。Audrey说那太棒了，期待带它们去徒步，希望找到一个风景优美、空间充足、供它们探索玩耍的地点。Andrew表示期待看到它们在徒步中玩得开心，并计划下个月动身，附地图的照片为一棵树木繁茂的公园地图。Audrey将着手研究适合自己毛孩子奔跑的步道。Andrew说听起来不错，确保步道对狗狗安全有保障。Audrey回应，安全是外出让狗儿奔跑时的首要任务。Andrew同意，认为和狗在一起会很棒。Audrey提到“今天会有一些很酷的事情发生”，附图为三只狗坐在地上系着牵引绳的照片。Andrew感叹它们看起来很可爱，似乎已经准备好冒险。Audrey回应，确实如此，它们已经为下一次户外冒险做好准备。Andrew说很期待见到它们，它们看起来很有活力。Audrey表示它们确实很有趣，外出时很有乐趣。Andrew说狗确实为日常生活增添许多乐趣。Audrey补充，它们给她带来极大喜悦，外出时永不无聊，并附两只在田野追逐球的照片。Andrew称它们在公园玩耍十分可爱，看到它们如此开心一定非常值得。Audrey回应，看它们如此快乐让她也非常开心。Andrew说它们的快乐具有传染力，光看照片就让他开心。Audrey说它们精力充沛，总是让人露出笑容。Andrew表示它们能让每个人都笑，迫不及待想和它们一起徒步。Audrey答道，和它们一起徒步一定会很棒，期待看它们在徒步中享受快乐。Andrew则表示他也等不及看到它们在徒步中玩得开心，感到非常兴奋。Audrey自信地说这一天将会非常美好，并展示本地公园中自己狗犬的开心样子照片。Andrew称它们很可爱，一定会是美好的一天，他也喜欢户外并乐于看到他人也在享受。Audrey补充，户外并看到人们快乐同样很棒，并附上一张去年的徒步日落照片，照片中有人站在山上望向天空。Andrew问这张日落在哪儿，Audrey回答这是去年她去的地方，距她家有3小时车程，日落非常惊艳。Andrew称这是很棒的日落和景色，尤其在自然环绕中。Audrey说这是一个美丽的瞬间，颜色鲜艳且感觉平静，她对这样的时刻心存感激，提醒自己要欣赏自然之美与珍惜小事，附日落时湖泊与山脉的照片。Andrew感叹自然能带来惊人景象，Audrey补充自然确有惊喜，所有鲜艳颜色带来平静感，令人屏息。Andrew认同，自然之美令人惊叹，若我们花时间欣赏这些时刻，生活也会很棒；Audrey回应，停下欣赏这些时刻确实会让生活更好。
[July 08, 2023, 09:48 AM] Andrew: Hey how's it g
udrey: I hiked this last year! It was a 3 hour drive from me and the sunset was amazin
[July 08, 2023, 09:48 AM] Audrey: I'm 100% sure that it's gonna be a great day! Ju

【Park Walks and Dogs】会话日期：2023年6月13日。05:23 PM 的对话中，Audrey 介绍上周找到一个适合狗狗散步的小公园，公园内有一条被树木环绕的小径，认为很不错，狗狗也可能喜欢，并邀请 Andrew 一同前往。Andrew 表示愿意加入，与狗狗在自然环境中散步。Audrey 表示很期待与大家一起活动，狗狗也喜欢结识新朋友。两人表示期待在公园散步。散步时拍摄的照片显示两只狗在草地上奔跑，口中叼着球，看起来很开心。Andrew 说它们看起来真的很开心，也期待在公园散步。Audrey 指出狗需要运动和探索，它们总是带着笑容回家，回家时会显得疲惫。Andrew 认为让它们探索和玩耍很重要，相信它们一定很喜欢。Audrey 说它们是一天中最喜欢的部分，一旦她准备带它们散步，它们的脸就会变得更开心；还分享了另一张照片，显示两只狗在一片草地上玩飞盘。Andrew 表示两只狗在照片中看起来很满足，草地也很美，自然让宠物感到快乐。
[June 13, 2023, 05:23 PM] Audrey: Wow going all 【Nature and Well-being】June 13, 2023, 05:23 PM: Andrew: Nature always makes us and our pets so happy. Audrey: Dogs and nature bring me so much joy and peace. Andrew: Yeah, I agree, it's really nice. Audrey: Being outdoors with them puts me in my happy place; it's peaceful and inspiring. Andrew: Glad you found something that puts you in your happy place; it's true, being outdoors has a way of inspiring and calming us. Audrey: Yeah! It's incredible how nature can make us think differently. Andrew: Agreed! It's great for refreshing the mind and giving a different outlook. Whenever I'm in need of a reset, I turn to nature. Audrey: Nature has a way of making us feel alive and centered. Let's appreciate what it gives us.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Dogs】2023年10月13日04:22 PM，Andrew 与 Audrey 的对话中包含以下要点：上周二（2023年10月10日），Andrew 和他的女友 Toby 一起度过了一个很棒的夜晚，玩桌游。Audrey 最近做了一些甜点，感谢邻居的狗友好环境，并问周末有何计划。Audrey 问能否带她的狗来，Andrew 表示不确定是否适合，但附近有一个很棒的狗公园，或许还能把咖啡带过去。Audrey 说狗公园对它们来说像天堂，喜欢和其他狗社交并大量运动，看到它们奔跑和嗅闻一切很可爱。Andrew 回忆道：有一次他的狗过于兴奋，追着松鼠在树周围奔跑，松鼠从树枝上观看，场面很搞笑。Audrey 问他的狗的品种，他说 Toby 是 German Shephard，且喜欢穿可爱的毛衣，非常活跃，并问对方的狗在公园喜欢玩哪些游戏。Audrey 回答她的狗最爱 Fetch 与 Frisbee，喜欢奔跑、结识其他狗，甚至可以跑好几个小时。Andrew 表示这听起来很有趣，看到它们快乐、活跃让人感到欣慰。Audrey 说看到它们快乐会让她心里充满喜悦，觉得它们带来无条件的爱；她还提到自己曾有四只狗的纹身，后来去纹身店在纹身上又添加了一些图案。Andrew 问她是否还会再养新狗或再纹身，Audrey 回答现在已经够了，除非未来某天决定再养一只狗，那时可能再纹一次。Andrew 指出这些狗确实是她的情感来源，给予灵感，他们也会被像这样的地方所启发；他提到一张路在树林中的照片作为灵感来源。Audrey 表示它们确实给她带来快乐，体验无条件的爱是美好的，并问 Andrew 是否有机会去像这样的森林散步，可能是一次很棒的逃离。Andrew 回应说他们与狗一起徒步是增进关系、创造回忆的有趣方式，Audrey 也表示她仍记得每次大家和狗一起走在徒步路上时的美好时光。
[October 13, 2023, 04:22 PM] Andrew: Hey Audrey, it 【Cafes】Session Date: October 13, 2023. On October 13, 2023 at 04:22 PM, Andrew said Friday night's board game session was a nice break and that this weekend he planned to check out a cozy cafe to hang out there; image shared by Andrew: a photo of a group of people sitting at a table in a room. Audrey asked for other spots he would recommend. Andrew added that this new spot had just opened the other day and is awesome with a sick view and vibe; image shared by Andrew: a photo of a man sitting on a couch in a large open space. 【Nature Trails】Nature Trails 会话，日期为 2023年10月13日，04:22 PM。Andrew 表示在城市生活确实很想念自然，尽量在有条件时去附近的公园或徒步，这对他而言是和平且愉快的体验，并附有一张照片，画面是一名女子在海景前沿着陡坡走向海景。Audrey 表示同样需要自然时间；近来生活忙乱，已经有一段时间没有带她的毛茸茸朋友外出散步，但在自然中的那些时刻让人放松且快乐，她们无疑是探索户外的最佳伙伴。Andrew 完全同意，认为自然与动物可以带来平静与快乐，并希望你和你的毛茸茸伙伴尽快有一些有趣的冒险。Audrey 表示需要和它们去徒步，这将是很好的治疗。

【Beach and Nature】On October 01, 2023, at 07:09 PM, Andrew stated that the gf and I are hitting the beach next month with Toby and shared an image: a photo of a sunset over the ocean with waves. Audrey replied that she is looking forward to the beach trip and to our hike with the dogs next month; the dogs always put a smile on my face—life's just not the same without them. Andrew said he can't wait for the hike; it's been a long time since they were all in nature together, he misses that experience and can't wait for the upcoming hike. He added that everyone should ditch the hustle and bustle every now and then, and that being in nature is refreshing. 【Dog Park & Trails】On October 01, 2023 at 07:09 PM, Audrey stated that being in a nature environment is a great way to relax; for me, taking the doggos out for a walk in the park helps clear my mind and find some peace, it's been tough lately, but it definitely helps. An image shared by Audrey shows a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew observed that it looks ideal for them to play and asked where they took them. Audrey replied: We took them to the dog park nearby last Saturday; there was a big grassy area for them to play and lots of shaded spots for me to relax; they had a great time. The pups and I are loving it; being out in nature and checking out new trails with the doggos is so different from being in the city.

【Audrey-Andrew Catch-Up】March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM: Audrey and Andrew exchanged messages. Andrew started a new job last week as a Financial Analyst, a change from his previous job. Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

【Toby】Session Date: July 11, 2023. July 11, 2023, 10:05 AM: Andrew introduces Toby, his puppy, a joyful addition he could not resist bringing home in city living; an image of a dog sitting on a leash indoors was shared. Audrey acknowledges Toby's adorableness and congratulates Andrew on the new addition, expressing happiness. July 11, 2023, 10:05 AM: Andrew states Toby brings a lot of joy; since the last talk, work has been piling up and he has been stuck inside, and he misses the peace and freedom that comes with going for a hike. 【Dog Tags】July 11, 2023, 10:05 AM: Audrey stated she is in for the hike and that her dogs can come; she had made personalized wooden keychains with engraved names for them and shared an image of them. Andrew asked if she made them; Audrey answered that she made them herself and wanted each to be special and fit their personalities. Andrew commented, "Wow, those look great! Did you make them? It's really cool!" Audrey replied, "Thanks! Yeah, I made them myself. I wanted each one to be special and fit their personalities." Andrew added, "Wow, that's so cool. You really put so much love into making them, which makes them extra special." Audrey stated, "Thanks! I did put a lot of love into making these tags. I want my pets to feel seen and loved." Andrew observed, "It really are the small things like these show we care a ton about out pets." Audrey concluded, "Yep! Small acts of love like that make a big difference in our relationships with our furry pals. Let's make sure they know how much we care!" 【Hiking Plans】On July 11, 2023 at 10:05 AM, Audrey noted that work has been non-stop and stressful, making it hard to get outdoors, and stated that hiking is a great way to relax and take in nature, proposing to plan a trip for both of them and their pups. Andrew replied that work has been stressful lately and he needs a break; he has plans for a hike next month and suggested that Audrey and the pups could come along so they can enjoy nature and have a fun time, adding that dogs bring them so much joy and it's only fair to show them how special they are, and that he can't wait for the hike and for Toby and Audrey's pups to meet. Audrey then said she can't wait either; it's going to be loads of fun and a great memory. Andrew concluded that it'll be an adventure. Audrey said she's counting down the days until the hike and needs to get them ready soon. Andrew echoed that it's going to be awesome and said let's talk later.

【Buddy and Toby】2023年10月19日06:12 PM，Audrey 表示她上周一去了宠物商店为她的狗买玩具，看到它们回家时的兴奋让她意识到自己有多爱它们以及它们带来的快乐；她还分享了一张盒子里装满玩具和其他物品的照片。

2023年10月19日06:12 PM，Andrew 宣布他从收容所再收养了一只小狗，这只狗叫 Buddy，是他的伙伴；他表示 Buddy 在新家里做得很好，但还在适应 Toby 和新环境，Toby 也需要一些时间来与他相处；他还说从未想过养宠物会带来如此多的快乐。

Audrey 问 Buddy 的名字是什么，Andrew 回答说他把它叫 Buddy，因为它是他的 buddy，并且他希望它和 Toby 能成为 buddies。

2023年10月19日06:12 PM，Audrey 表示 Buddy 似乎是他的 sidekick，并问他们两人一起最喜欢的活动；Andrew 回答说他们一起散步，享受清新空气；他还说 Buddy 喜欢和他们一起探索新的登山小径，对大自然的一切都感到兴奋。

2023年10月19日06:12 PM，Audrey 说 Buddy 看起来很开心，适合一起度过时光，并分享了一张在小径上遛狗的照片；Andrew 回应他很快就会带着两只狗一起去小径。

2023年10月19日06:12 PM，Audrey 表示她等不及与毛茸茸的朋友们在下个月一起徒步，这将会很棒；Andrew 表示当然会很有趣，新的成员加入后，并分享了一张泥路上有一头牛站在中间的照片。
[October 19, 2023, 06:12 PM] Audrey: Hey Andrew, ho 【Audrey & Andrew: Hike Spots】On October 19, 2023, at 06:12 PM, Audrey asked where this gorgeous spot is and said she needs to take her pups for a stroll there; Andrew replied that it is nowhere near the city and wished to take them to a place like this, far from the city, and shared an image of a red truck driving down a road in a field. 5.question: Which meat does Audrey prefer eating more than others?
