memories.memory:
【Audrey & Andrew: Pet Search】June 02, 2023, 11:27 AM: Andrew remains on the hunt for a pet-friendly spot in the city; he has checked out some places but has had no luck so far, and he is determined to find the right place for his dog. Audrey offers support and asks Andrew to email his criteria so she can help him find a great spot for his furry friend. Andrew thanks her and reaffirms that he will not give up. Audrey states they will keep searching and stay positive. 【Nature Moment】[Nature Moment]
[Session Date: June 02, 2023]

At 11:27 AM on June 02, 2023, Audrey stated that it was really special; she said nature always cheers her up and makes her feel grateful, and she was glad the other person could experience it too. She asked how the other person's search for a furry friend was going.

【Dog Adoption】[Dog Adoption]
[Session Date: May 06, 2023]

[May 06, 2023, 10:47 AM] Andrew: Since the last conversation, I have been looking for a dog to adopt—browsing websites, visiting shelters, and asking friends of theirs—a process that has been both fun and annoying; an image shows a dog looking through a cage at the camera.

[May 06, 2023, 10:47 AM] Audrey: Audrey asks what can be done to make the process smoother; image shows two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouths.

[May 06, 2023, 10:47 AM] Andrew: Meeting all these adorable pups has been awesome; for those considering getting a pup, the size of living space and the exercise needs of the breed are important; for me, a person living in an apartment, a smaller dog would be best, but if one is active, consider getting one that loves to play and run.

[May 06, 2023, 10:47 AM] Audrey: It is important to consider the space and energy needs of a dog. 【Housing Search】[Housing Search]
[Session Date: May 06, 2023]

On May 06, 2023, at 10:47 AM, Andrew stated that finding a pet-friendly place to live has been tough; he is contacting landlords and checking out neighborhoods to find the perfect spot, and he is looking for a place near a park or woods to stay close to nature and give the dog a large open space to run around. Audrey acknowledged the difficulty of finding housing and asked if there is a particular part of town he wants to live in, then offered encouragement: Good luck with your search! Fingers crossed you find the perfect one. 【Support and Updates】May 06, 2023, 10:47 AM: Andrew states he is still on the lookout for the perfect furry friend. Audrey offers to help and wishes him good luck with the search. Andrew says he will let Audrey know how it goes. Audrey says to keep her posted and to let her know if he needs any suggestions or help. Andrew says he will and that he really appreciates it. Audrey says she will be expecting a pic of his dog soon. Andrew says he can't wait and that he will ttyl as he checks out another shelter soon. Audrey concludes with Have fun and Ttyl.

【Park & Dog Owners Group】[Park & Dog Owners Group]
[Session Date: November 04, 2023]

[November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM] Andrew: Andrew and his girlfriend went on a bike ride and stumbled upon a park outside of town; it was awesome to get away from the city and be surrounded by nature. [Image shared by Andrew: a photo of two people riding bikes on a paved path]

[November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM] Audrey: Audrey checks out new parks with her four pups; last weekend the dogs were able to run around and get some fresh air; she recently joined a dog owners group to learn how to better take care of them. [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park]

[November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM] Andrew: That sounds great; your four pups must have a lot of fun; how often do you hang out with the dog owners group?

[November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM] Audrey: The dogs are having a lot of fun; I try to meet up with other dog owners once a week for tips from other parents and so they can all play together; how about you? Have you ever thought about joining? [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of people and dogs in a park] 【Toby & Buddy Care】On November 04, 2023, at 07:59 PM, Andrew said that seeing Toby and Buddy made him think about getting another dog, but he remained unsure; having two dogs is already a lot to take care of, and he asked for tips on being a multi-dog pet owner. Audrey advised focusing on Toby and Buddy first, stating that keeping them happy and healthy would be a good first step before expanding to more dogs. Andrew agreed, saying that was what he needed to hear and that he would take good care of his dogs first. Audrey offered help and stated that you don't need more dogs to make them happy, referencing an image she shared of two dogs playing with a frisbee in a park. 【Andrew & Audrey: City Dogs】November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM: Andrew states he has managed to make it work with dogs while still living in the city. Audrey notes that taking care of a pup in the city is tough but doable with the right approach, keeping them active is key, and shares a photo of how she entertains them in her house with toys and games (Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a basket full of stuffed animals on a wooden floor). Andrew says it's great to know there are ways to keep them active in the city. Audrey adds that there are lots of ways to keep them happy in the city, socialize and exercise them daily, and add mental stimulation; here's a pic of them playing fetch in the park - they love it! (Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth). Andrew asks what sorts of activities are used to stay mentally stimulated. Audrey lists activities: puzzles, training, hide-and-seek - they love it all! (Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog playing with a frisbee in a room). Andrew says he'll try those activities with his pups. Audrey says Let me know how it goes. Andrew says your advice and support really mean a lot to me.

【Audrey-Andrew Catch-Up】March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM: Audrey and Andrew exchanged messages. Andrew started a new job last week as a Financial Analyst, a change from his previous job. Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

【Toby hiking】Session Date: September 06, 2023. At 07:49 PM, Andrew described last weekend's hike and shared a photo of the sunset observed during the hike; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a person on a mountain with a view of the city]. Audrey asked whether Andrew planned to hike with Toby someday. At 07:49 PM, Andrew stated he has been wanting to hike with Toby for a while, but it's difficult since Toby is still young. 【Toby housing】[Toby housing]
[Session Date: September 06, 2023]
On September 06, 2023, at 07:49 PM, Audrey asked whether a dog-friendly place to live had been found yet, noting that she remembered him mentioning it. Andrew replied that he hadn't found one yet and that it's been a bit challenging, and he expressed appreciation for the help and said he would keep searching for that perfect place for dogs. 【Toby encouragement】On September 06, 2023, at 07:49 PM, Audrey posted two encouragement messages: "Keep going, you'll find a great place to live for your pet soon!" and "No worries! You got this. Don't give up. Take care!"

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Pixie & Pepper】Session Date: April 02, 2023. On April 02, 2023, at 02:42 PM, Audrey announced that they adopted another puppy named Pixie, a small white dog; Pixie is SO cute. Audrey shared an image of Pixie, a small white dog sitting on a carpet. She noted Pixie has been keeping them busy, so she hasn't had a chance to check out that hiking spot yet. Andrew asked whether Pixie has settled in and is getting along with the other pups. Audrey reported Pixie is fitting in great; it took her a few days to get used to the other dogs, but now they're awesome friends and they love playing and exploring the house. Audrey shared an image of a dog playing with a group of other dogs. Andrew asked whether Pepper is adjusting well to Pixie. Audrey stated Pepper took a bit to get used to her, but now they're always together. Audrey shared an image of two dogs standing in the grass near a fence. 【Pixie Hiking】Session Date: April 02, 2023

On April 02, 2023, at 02:42 PM, Andrew said: That's awesome! Pixie is so cute! Did you ever check out that hiking spot we talked about last time? That pic is so cute! It would be fun to hang out with a dog, cuddling away. Got me thinking of my old hiking pics and how much I miss exploring nature trails with my family's dog. Ah, the peaceful moments out in nature! Image shared by Andrew: a photo of a man walking a dog on a trail

Audrey responded: Taking them on hikes must be awesome! That makes me want to hike with my dogs.

Andrew said: Hiking with a dog is way fun, it's a great way to bond and create memories together. Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a man sitting on a rock with a dog

Audrey concluded: Yeah! Exploring nature with them and making memories is awesome! 【Apartment & Dog-Friendly Spots】April 02, 2023, 02:42 PM: Andrew asked for tips on finding a dog-friendly place in the city. Audrey replied that they used websites that helped them find a place that allowed dogs, with filters that made it easy, and they found a perfect spot; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog sitting in a field of flowers. Andrew said he would try those websites. Audrey expressed hope that he would find a great spot soon and a furry friend, and Andrew hoped to find one soon and start exploring again. 【Cuddle Photos】Session Date: April 02, 2023. At 02:42 PM Audrey said, "You'll love them! They're great for cuddles and companionship," and, "Our furry friends make great cuddle buddies. Here's one of them enjoying some lazy couch time!" (Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog laying on a couch with a pillow). At 02:42 PM Andrew said, "It'd be so great to have a furry buddy to cuddle and hang with," and shared a photo of his family's dog on a couch (Image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a couch in a living room).

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. memories.memory: 【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Nature Hike】[Nature Hike]
[Session Date: May 11, 2023]

[May 11, 2023, 02:03 PM] Audrey stated, "That hike sounds great. Nature is good for the soul, right?" Her week was good; taking care of her four doggies and ensuring their happiness and health took up most of her free time. She signed up for a workshop about bonding with her pet next month and cannot wait to learn new stuff and strengthen her bond with her pets. Audrey asked Andrew how he was doing. Image shared by Audrey: a photograph of a group of dogs with a yellow circle. 【Dog Training Workshop】On May 11, 2023 at 02:03 PM, Andrew and Audrey discussed a Dog Training Workshop. Audrey saw a flyer for a positive reinforcement training class at her local pet store; a volunteer in the store allowed her to meet their dog, which was friendly and playful. Andrew noted that positive reinforcement can help bond with dogs and asked whether they'll catch on quickly. Audrey replied that they'll catch on quickly; they're quick learners and love rewards; she can't wait to learn how to train them better. Andrew asked to be updated on their progress. Audrey said she would keep updates on how it goes and how her pups are doing, hoping they'll be extra behaved, and that she'll share tips on training a future dog as well. Andrew thanked her and said he's excited to hear about it and to have a great time at the workshop. Audrey said she'll definitely have a good time and that this is a must learn for any dog owner. Andrew remarked that she might be a good salesperson because he's almost sold on the class. Audrey stated that it's important for pets to learn to behave on a positive reinforcement way; punishment is never the proper way for pets ya know? Andrew said he wouldn't want to be punished, let alone puppies and dogs. Audrey added she doesn't want to hurt any of her dogs; thinking about it gives her pain. Andrew said he would look into their classes and talk soon.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

Audrey attached a photo of them looking groomed, with shiny coats, and noted they were really good at the salon, which she always worries about in new places. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. [May 11, 2023, 02:03 PM] Audrey stated, "That hike sounds great. Nature is good for the soul, right?" Her week was good; taking care of her four doggies and ensuring their happiness and health took up most of her free time. She signed up for a workshop about bonding with her pet next month and cannot wait to learn new stuff and strengthen her bond with her pets. Audrey asked Andrew how he was doing. Image shared by Audrey: a photograph of a group of dogs with a yellow circle. 【Dog Training Workshop】On May 11, 2023 at 02:03 PM, Andrew and Audrey discussed a Dog Training Workshop. Audrey saw a flyer for a positive reinforcement training class at her local pet store; a volunteer in the store allowed her to meet their dog, which was friendly and playful. Andrew noted that positive reinforcement can help bond with dogs and asked whether they'll catch on quickly. Audrey replied that they'll catch on quickly; they're quick learners and love rewards; she can't wait to learn how to train them better. Andrew asked to be updated on their progress. Audrey said she would keep updates on how it goes and how her pups are doing, hoping they'll be extra behaved, and that she'll share tips on training a future dog as well. Andrew thanked her and said he's excited to hear about it and to have a great time at the workshop. Audrey said she'll definitely have a good time and that this is a must learn for any dog owner. Andrew remarked that she might be a good salesperson because he's almost sold on the class. Audrey stated that it's important for pets to learn to behave on a positive reinforcement way; punishment is never the proper way for pets ya know? Andrew said he wouldn't want to be punished, let alone puppies and dogs. Audrey added she doesn't want to hurt any of her dogs; thinking about it gives her pain. Andrew said he would look into their classes and talk soon.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. Audrey stated that all four dogs are mutts: two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that some dog breeds bond better than others. Audrey shared an image of a group of dogs tied to a leash on a brick walkway. Audrey then shared an image of three small dogs sitting on a couch with white fur. Andrew asked whether there are any other furry pals they play with, or just the ones Audrey has. Audrey answered: Just my fur babies, and shared an image of a dog and a teddy bear sleeping on a couch. 【Walks】September 24, 2023, 05:53 PM: Andrew asked Audrey, "Wow, teaching them tricks must be super fun! How often do you take them for walks?" Audrey replied, "Very often, multiple times a day even, it's a great exercise for them and great bonding time for us." [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs sitting next to each other on a beach]

She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

She asked: "What about anything new you've been into lately?"

【Dog Grooming】在 2023 年 8 月 19 日 21:19，Audrey 与 Andrew 就 Audrey 的狗狗美容进展展开对话。Audrey 表示八月很有事件性，她学会了新技能，开始自行为狗狗进行护理，确保它们被宠爱且开心，完成后它们看起来很可爱。她还发送了 grooming 完成后的照片，照片显示一只狗站在房间的桌子上，看起来柔软蓬松。Andrew 夸赞她的照护并请求再看一张 grooming 后的照片。Audrey 发送照片，指它们看起来又软又蓬松。Andrew 问她是如何做到如此出色，他说一直想学习狗狗美容但从未有时间。Audrey 回答说她参加过狗狗美容课程，学到了很多技巧，并问是否愿意听些技巧。Andrew 表示当然，愿意听。Audrey 给出技巧：grooming 要慢而温和，关注耳朵和爪子等敏感部位，并在整个过程保持耐心和积极态度。Andrew 表示这些技巧很实用，若有机会为 Toby 打理毛发就会记住这些。Audrey 回应说没问题，很高兴技巧对他有帮助，并表示如果他尝试，请告诉她，她可以提供更多建议。

【Content】Session Date: October 24, 2023; at 10:14 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend went to a wine tasting last weekend; it was great; they tried many unique wines and learned a lot; he was surprised at how much he enjoyed it; a reminder to step out of the comfort zone.

【Content】Session Date: October 24, 2023. On October 24, 2023, at 10:14 AM, Audrey said she had fun at the wine tasting and that trying new things can be cool. She described an unexpected adventure last week: an accident while playing with her pups at the park, and taking care of them with one arm has been tricky, but we're managing. She asked what's been up with you and whether there are any new interests. [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a person with a cast on their arm and arm in a cast]

【Peruvian Lilies】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew noted that Peruvian Lilies bring so much into their lives and it's amazing to watch them interact, and he shared an image of a balcony with a bunch of flowers on it. Audrey replied that taking care of something like this relaxes her and brings peace; she personally has a small garden. Andrew asked how it's going. Audrey said it's going great; the flowers are looking great and her veggie patch is coming along; it's so fun to see them grow and really feels accomplishing. She shared an image of a cactus plant with two white flowers. Andrew asked what kind they are. Audrey stated they are Peruvian Lilies; they are awesome, with bright colors and delicate petals. Andrew said they're beautiful, vibrant and eye-catching, and asked if they are difficult to care for. Audrey replied that nope, they're easy to take care of, perfect for me; just gotta water them and make sure they get enough sun. She shared an image of a dog laying on a wooden dock in a pond. Andrew said awesome, do they enjoy playing in the garden too. Audrey said yes, they do enjoy the garden, always running around, exploring and having a great time, so adorable. Audrey shared an image of two dogs running in a grassy field.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Content】Session Date: August 24, 2023. At 12:24 AM on August 24, 2023, Andrew told Audrey that last weekend he and his girlfriend went fishing in one of the nearby lakes; it was nice; they got a few fish and had a blast; he asked whether Audrey has ever gone fishing before.

【Audrey's Dogs – Hiking & Safety】On May 03, 2023 at 05:41 PM, Audrey stated that not much has changed since they last talked; she is busy taking care of her pets and spending time with them, and finds it fulfilling; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew asked whether Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes. Audrey stated that her dogs go nuts on hikes; they love exploring new scents and being in nature—it's their happy place; she can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it; it's so great to see them having so much fun; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. Andrew asked for tips or tricks for keeping dogs safe when they're out and about. Audrey stated that safety is super important for me; she even got them something special; they sure look funny, but it works; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog with a leash and shoes on. 【Audrey's Walks – Fetch & Socials】Session Date: May 03, 2023. May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Awesome to see that you take such good care of your dogs! What else do you do when you walk them? Audrey: When I take them out, we usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee. They love chasing it! We also meet other dog owners in the park and have a doggie playdate. It's a great way for me to chat with people and for them to make new friends. [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog catching a frisbee in a field] May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Wow, looks like fun! They sure look excited about playing fetch! Audrey: They absolutely adore it! They have tons of energy and love meeting new pals at playdates. Plus, they always get excited when I bring those out. [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog wearing a party hat sitting on a couch] 【Audrey's Playdates & Dog Park】会话日期：2023年5月3日，时间：17:41。Andrew 问：它们是否喜欢戴派对帽？以及你从哪里找到它们的玩耍约会。Audrey 回答：帽子并不打扰它们，它们戴帽子只是为了好玩和得到零食。狗公园是一个很好的起点，它们可以在那儿奔跑并与其他狗狗互动，是玩耍约会的有趣地点。Audrey 分享的图片：一张狗跳过公园环的照片。Andrew 问：它位于哪里？Audrey 回答：就在我们通常散步的公园旁边，那里有很多树和长椅，便于我们观看狗狗玩耍。Andrew 表示：那也不算太远吧！我得去看看。 【Audrey & Andrew – Closing Chat】Audrey and Andrew – Closing Chat; Session Date: May 03, 2023. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Audrey: Yup! Not at all! Let me know how it goes. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Andrew: Sure, I'll let you know. Always great chatting with you! Ttyl.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. 【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Audrey's Pup Tattoo】会话标题：Audrey's Pup Tattoo；会话日期：April 16, 2023。在 2023年4月16日 04:19 PM 的对话中，Audrey 表示她对狗极为热爱，甚至在臂上纹了关于它们的纹身，图片显示她臂上的纹身为狗与向日葵；Andrew 评价纹身看起来很棒。Audrey 回答：谢谢！我是在一段时间以前纹的，它代表我对我的狗与自然之美的爱，并附有一张她带着狗在林中散步的照片。Andrew 问她为何要纹这个纹身。Audrey 表示她一直与它们有强烈的纽带，它们让我很开心，即使它们不在我身边，我也想看到它们开心的样子。Andrew 表示：那太棒了，我很高兴它们给你的生活带来如此多的快乐。

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. Audrey stated that all four dogs are mutts: two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that some dog breeds bond better than others. Audrey shared an image of a group of dogs tied to a leash on a brick walkway. Audrey then shared an image of three small dogs sitting on a couch with white fur. Andrew asked whether there are any other furry pals they play with, or just the ones Audrey has. Audrey answered: Just my fur babies, and shared an image of a dog and a teddy bear sleeping on a couch. 【Walks】September 24, 2023, 05:53 PM: Andrew asked Audrey, "Wow, teaching them tricks must be super fun! How often do you take them for walks?" Audrey replied, "Very often, multiple times a day even, it's a great exercise for them and great bonding time for us." [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs sitting next to each other on a beach]

Audrey saw a flyer for a positive reinforcement training class at her local pet store; a volunteer in the store allowed her to meet their dog, which was friendly and playful. Andrew noted that positive reinforcement can help bond with dogs and asked whether they'll catch on quickly. Audrey replied that they'll catch on quickly; they're quick learners and love rewards; she can't wait to learn how to train them better. Andrew asked to be updated on their progress. Audrey said she would keep updates on how it goes and how her pups are doing, hoping they'll be extra behaved, and that she'll share tips on training a future dog as well. Andrew thanked her and said he's excited to hear about it and to have a great time at the workshop. Audrey said she'll definitely have a good time and that this is a must learn for any dog owner. Andrew remarked that she might be a good salesperson because he's almost sold on the class. Audrey stated that it's important for pets to learn to behave on a positive reinforcement way; punishment is never the proper way for pets ya know? Andrew said he wouldn't want to be punished, let alone puppies and dogs. Audrey added she doesn't want to hurt any of her dogs; thinking about it gives her pain. Andrew said he would look into their classes and talk soon.

Audrey replied that they're all mutts, with two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that they love running and playing fetch; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs curled up in a dog bed. 【Doggy Playdates】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew observed that they look comfy in that bed and are clearly well loved, and asked how old they are and how they are getting along. Audrey replied that they're all 3-year-old and they are a great pack; they had a doggy playdate last Friday, and it was a bit crazy but still lots of fun; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs laying on a couch with a blanket. At 08:32 PM, Andrew commented that they look adorable, doggy playdates sound like a lot of fun, and that he is glad they all get along. 【Audrey: Personal Update】On July 03, 2023 at 08:32 PM, Audrey said: "They really are my universe." She asked: "What about anything new you've been into lately?"

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. Audrey stated that all four dogs are mutts: two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that some dog breeds bond better than others. Audrey shared an image of a group of dogs tied to a leash on a brick walkway. Audrey then shared an image of three small dogs sitting on a couch with white fur. Andrew asked whether there are any other furry pals they play with, or just the ones Audrey has. Audrey answered: Just my fur babies, and shared an image of a dog and a teddy bear sleeping on a couch. 【Walks】September 24, 2023, 05:53 PM: Andrew asked Audrey, "Wow, teaching them tricks must be super fun! How often do you take them for walks?" Audrey replied, "Very often, multiple times a day even, it's a great exercise for them and great bonding time for us." [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs sitting next to each other on a beach]

【Audrey-Andrew Catch-Up】March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM: Audrey and Andrew exchanged messages. Andrew started a new job last week as a Financial Analyst, a change from his previous job. Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Pet Salon Grooming】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey reported that last Friday she took her fur kids to the pet salon; they were psyched and their tails wagged like crazy. It took a while for them to calm down, but after grooming they looked so cute. Audrey attached a photo of them looking groomed, with shiny coats, and noted they were really good at the salon, which she always worries about in new places. Andrew replied that they looked great and that it's nice to see them happy and calm in new places. Audrey shared the image: a dog standing on a table with a leash. 【Dog Mom】Audrey，2023-11-22 09:02，发言：看到它们在新地方快乐并安顿下来，对我意义重大；我觉得自己作为狗狗妈妈做得不错，哈哈；你带你的毛孩子去美容院了吗？

At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding.
