He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. 【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. 【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Audrey's Dogs – Hiking & Safety】On May 03, 2023 at 05:41 PM, Audrey stated that not much has changed since they last talked; she is busy taking care of her pets and spending time with them, and finds it fulfilling; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew asked whether Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes. Audrey stated that her dogs go nuts on hikes; they love exploring new scents and being in nature—it's their happy place; she can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it; it's so great to see them having so much fun; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. October 06, 2023, 09:41 PM: Andrew stated that dogs know how to find the simple joys of life and that appreciating the little things is important; he recalls the other person mentioning jewelry made with recycled objects and asks for more details. 【Jewelry and Charity】2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Audrey表示她喜欢用回收材料制作珠宝，搜集瓶盖、纽扣和破损珠宝并将其做成独一无二的饰品，且有一张照片显示她最喜欢的项链之一，珠宝各自有独特故事并具有各自的吸引力，且有助于减少废物。  
2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Andrew说这条项链很棒，颜色鲜明，设计很酷，认为让回收物件获得新生命很棒，并提问你是做来出售还是仅作为爱好，以及你是否把利润捐赠给一个善因？  
2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Audrey回答：我起初把珠宝当作爱好，随后开始销售；我把部分利润捐赠给一个对我心中的事业很重要的公益事业，将珠宝制作与改变世界结合起来；此外我也捐赠给动物收容所，那里的工作很出色，这是我的帮助方式。 【Impact and Resilience】[Impact and Resilience]
[Session Date: October 06, 2023]

[October 06, 2023, 09:41 PM] Andrew: 哇！你把热情用来改变世界的方式令人惊叹；这段经历是否改变了你对其他爱好的看法？你是否捐款给任何具体的组织？真是太棒了；你对改变世界的奉献精神如此具有启发性，即使你现在不能在收容所志愿服务。

[October 06, 2023, 09:41 PM] Audrey: 是的，虽然不能在那里，我仍在寻找做好事的方式；生活就是要适应并伸出援手。谢谢！我很感激你的善言；要保持坚强，在充满挑战的时刻继续做出改变。

【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. 【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. 2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Andrew说这条项链很棒，颜色鲜明，设计很酷，认为让回收物件获得新生命很棒，并提问你是做来出售还是仅作为爱好，以及你是否把利润捐赠给一个善因？

At 08:32 PM, Andrew says that's great news; it must feel so rewarding to see them doing well; he understands how it feels on missing the peace of being out on the trails, but for now, it's just urban adventures then. At 08:32 PM, Audrey states that seeing them do well is super rewarding; they give me so much love and happiness; she gets how frustrating it can be not to find pet-friendly spots; nature is so calming and restorative with them around; see how happy they are when they're out. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth. 【Dog-friendly Spots】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew stated that he still can't find any dog-friendly spots to rent. Audrey stated at 08:32 PM that she hasn't had a ton of time for new trails either; the dog-training course has been a big time sink but it's paid off because they're doing great. 【Breeds: Jack Russell & Chihuahua】On July 3, 2023, at 08:32 PM, Andrew asked what breed the dogs are and what they enjoy doing the most. Audrey replied that they're all mutts, with two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that they love running and playing fetch; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs curled up in a dog bed. 【Doggy Playdates】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew observed that they look comfy in that bed and are clearly well loved, and asked how old they are and how they are getting along. Audrey replied that they're all 3-year-old and they are a great pack; they had a doggy playdate last Friday, and it was a bit crazy but still lots of fun; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs laying on a couch with a blanket. At 08:32 PM, Andrew commented that they look adorable, doggy playdates sound like a lot of fun, and that he is glad they all get along. 【Audrey: Personal Update】On July 03, 2023 at 08:32 PM, Audrey said: "They really are my universe." She asked: "What about anything new you've been into lately?"

【Audrey-Andrew Catch-Up】March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM: Audrey and Andrew exchanged messages. Andrew started a new job last week as a Financial Analyst, a change from his previous job. Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

memories.memory: 【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Dog Joy】Dog Joy
Session Date: October 06, 2023

October 06, 2023, 09:41 PM: Andrew stated that dogs know how to find the simple joys of life and that appreciating the little things is important; he recalls the other person mentioning jewelry made with recycled objects and asks for more details. 【Jewelry and Charity】2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Audrey表示她喜欢用回收材料制作珠宝，搜集瓶盖、纽扣和破损珠宝并将其做成独一无二的饰品，且有一张照片显示她最喜欢的项链之一，珠宝各自有独特故事并具有各自的吸引力，且有助于减少废物。  
2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Andrew说这条项链很棒，颜色鲜明，设计很酷，认为让回收物件获得新生命很棒，并提问你是做来出售还是仅作为爱好，以及你是否把利润捐赠给一个善因？  
2023年10月6日09:41 PM，Audrey回答：我起初把珠宝当作爱好，随后开始销售；我把部分利润捐赠给一个对我心中的事业很重要的公益事业，将珠宝制作与改变世界结合起来；此外我也捐赠给动物收容所，那里的工作很出色，这是我的帮助方式。 【Impact and Resilience】[Impact and Resilience]
[Session Date: October 06, 2023]

[October 06, 2023, 09:41 PM] Andrew: 哇！你把热情用来改变世界的方式令人惊叹；这段经历是否改变了你对其他爱好的看法？你是否捐款给任何具体的组织？真是太棒了；你对改变世界的奉献精神如此具有启发性，即使你现在不能在收容所志愿服务。

[October 06, 2023, 09:41 PM] Audrey: 是的，虽然不能在那里，我仍在寻找做好事的方式；生活就是要适应并伸出援手。谢谢！我很感激你的善言；要保持坚强，在充满挑战的时刻继续做出改变。

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Eagles】[Eagles]
[Session Date: March 27, 2023]

[March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM] Andrew: I've always been awed by birds; their power to soar and explore new spots is amazing, and Eagles have always mesmerized me; they're so strong and graceful. Image shared by Andrew: a photo of two birds flying in the sky with a sun shining behind them.

[March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM] Audrey: Birds are amazing; I can imagine it feels incredible to soar and see the world from up high. Do you have a favorite type of bird?

【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。
[October 28, 2023, 02:36 PM] Audrey: Hey Andrew, I

【Max】2023 年 7 月 27 日 15:52，Andrew 表示他们听起来很棒，应该让你回忆起童年的狗狗 Max，并说你和狗狗的照片很可爱，狗看起来像是最爱玩的那只，强调宠物确实给生活带来快乐；并附上图片：一只狗坐在地上，地上有一个网球。 Audrey 表示感谢，并确认那张照片中的狗是 Max，你的童年狗；Max 精力充沛，喜欢玩接球，你和他有许多美好回忆，宠物确实带来很多快乐。 Audrey 进一步回忆道：小时候我和 Max 会在邻里散步很长时间，探索新路，他一边嗅闻一边在领地标记，我们因此变得非常亲近，我会向他倾诉我的担忧和希望，他是个很好的倾听者，总是在我身边。这些日子是我最喜欢的记忆之一。 【Audrey's Fur Babies】Session Date: July 27, 2023. 03:52 PM. Audrey states she has four fur babies who are more important to her than anything and shares an image from a park outing (Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a woman kissing a dog in a park). The four dogs' personalities are: oldest one is the most relaxed, like a wise old sage; the second one is always ready for a game; the third one can be naughty but loves a good cuddle; the youngest one is full of life and always up for an adventure; all have individual personalities that Audrey adores. Andrew responds, noting the photo and asking about their personalities, and asks if Audrey has any other special memories with Max that she remembers fondly. Andrew adds that pets are more than just pets—they become friends and confidants, always listening and providing comfort when needed, making us feel loved and understood, leaving a lasting mark on our lives. Audrey affirms that pets truly make life better, listen without judging, give unconditional love, leave a mark in our hearts, and remind us how it feels to be seen and understood; she is thankful to have them around, as they bring joy, comfort, and love.

【Pet Shelter Volunteering】Session Date: July 27, 2023. At 03:52 PM, Andrew stated that he and his girlfriend volunteered at a pet shelter on Monday; it was rewarding, they loved spending time with the animals, and it reminded him how much he loves them. Audrey responded that she is glad they experienced that, that helping animals is great and you can tell when they're happy, and that she should do that someday too. Andrew said that seeing the animals content makes him happy and shows how special and full of love they are, and asked, "Have you ever volunteered at an animal shelter?" He added, "You nailed it! That's why we went volunteering with animals." He noted it has been one of the most rewarding things he's ever done and that the animals lift our spirits with all their love, joy, and comfort. Audrey expressed that they're glad they got to experience it, that animals brighten our day and give love and joy, and that the pet shelter probably appreciated their help. Andrew said, "Yeah we had a blast volunteering. It's our way of giving back and making their lives better!" Audrey concluded that their kindness and care will make them happier, no doubt.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Audrey's Dogs – Hiking & Safety】On May 03, 2023 at 05:41 PM, Audrey stated that not much has changed since they last talked; she is busy taking care of her pets and spending time with them, and finds it fulfilling; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew asked whether Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes. Audrey stated that her dogs go nuts on hikes; they love exploring new scents and being in nature—it's their happy place; she can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it; it's so great to see them having so much fun; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. Andrew asked for tips or tricks for keeping dogs safe when they're out and about. Audrey stated that safety is super important for me; she even got them something special; they sure look funny, but it works; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog with a leash and shoes on. 【Audrey's Walks – Fetch & Socials】Session Date: May 03, 2023. May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Awesome to see that you take such good care of your dogs! What else do you do when you walk them? Audrey: When I take them out, we usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee. They love chasing it! We also meet other dog owners in the park and have a doggie playdate. It's a great way for me to chat with people and for them to make new friends. [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog catching a frisbee in a field] May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Wow, looks like fun! They sure look excited about playing fetch! Audrey: They absolutely adore it! They have tons of energy and love meeting new pals at playdates. Plus, they always get excited when I bring those out. Audrey said that looked fun, asked where it is, and said she would love to take the dogs there sometime soon. Andrew identified the place as the doggy daycare near him and reiterated that it has a big indoor space for dogs to play. Audrey said she would definitely take a look at it and thanked him for the tip. Andrew offered to help find more places for dogs if needed. 【Pet Love & Community】[Session Date: June 26, 2023]

【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。
[October 28, 2023, 02:36 PM] Audrey: Hey Andrew, I

【Audrey's Dogs – Hiking & Safety】On May 03, 2023 at 05:41 PM, Audrey stated that not much has changed since they last talked; she is busy taking care of her pets and spending time with them, and finds it fulfilling; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew asked whether Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes. Audrey stated that her dogs go nuts on hikes; they love exploring new scents and being in nature—it's their happy place; she can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it; it's so great to see them having so much fun; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. Andrew asked for tips or tricks for keeping dogs safe when they're out and about. Audrey stated that safety is super important for me; she even got them something special; they sure look funny, but it works; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog with a leash and shoes on. 【Audrey's Walks – Fetch & Socials】Session Date: May 03, 2023. May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Awesome to see that you take such good care of your dogs! What else do you do when you walk them? Audrey: When I take them out, we usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee. They love chasing it! We also meet other dog owners in the park and have a doggie playdate. It's a great way for me to chat with people and for them to make new friends. [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog catching a frisbee in a field] May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Wow, looks like fun! They sure look excited about playing fetch! Audrey: They absolutely adore it! They have tons of energy and love meeting new pals at playdates. Plus, they always get excited when I bring those out. [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog wearing a party hat sitting on a couch] 【Audrey's Playdates & Dog Park】会话日期：2023年5月3日，时间：17:41。Andrew 问：它们是否喜欢戴派对帽？以及你从哪里找到它们的玩耍约会。Audrey 回答：帽子并不打扰它们，它们戴帽子只是为了好玩和得到零食。狗公园是一个很好的起点，它们可以在那儿奔跑并与其他狗狗互动，是玩耍约会的有趣地点。Audrey 分享的图片：一张狗跳过公园环的照片。Andrew 问：它位于哪里？Audrey 回答：就在我们通常散步的公园旁边，那里有很多树和长椅，便于我们观看狗狗玩耍。Andrew 表示：那也不算太远吧！我得去看看。 【Audrey & Andrew – Closing Chat】Audrey and Andrew – Closing Chat; Session Date: May 03, 2023. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Audrey: Yup! Not at all! Let me know how it goes. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Andrew: Sure, I'll let you know. Always great chatting with you! Ttyl.

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. Audrey stated that all four dogs are mutts: two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that some dog breeds bond better than others. Audrey shared an image of a group of dogs tied to a leash on a brick walkway. Audrey then shared an image of three small dogs sitting on a couch with white fur. Andrew asked whether there are any other furry pals they play with, or just the ones Audrey has. Audrey answered: Just my fur babies, and shared an image of a dog and a teddy bear sleeping on a couch. 【Walks】September 24, 2023, 05:53 PM: Andrew asked Audrey, "Wow, teaching them tricks must be super fun! How often do you take them for walks?" Audrey replied, "Very often, multiple times a day even, it's a great exercise for them and great bonding time for us." Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Dog Grooming】在 2023 年 8 月 19 日 21:19，Audrey 与 Andrew 就 Audrey 的狗狗美容进展展开对话。Audrey 表示八月很有事件性，她学会了新技能，开始自行为狗狗进行护理，确保它们被宠爱且开心，完成后它们看起来很可爱。她还发送了 grooming 完成后的照片，照片显示一只狗站在房间的桌子上，看起来柔软蓬松。Andrew 夸赞她的照护并请求再看一张 grooming 后的照片。Audrey 发送照片，指它们看起来又软又蓬松。Andrew 问她是如何做到如此出色，他说一直想学习狗狗美容但从未有时间。Audrey 回答说她参加过狗狗美容课程，学到了很多技巧，并问是否愿意听些技巧。Andrew 表示当然，愿意听。Audrey 给出技巧：grooming 要慢而温和，关注耳朵和爪子等敏感部位，并在整个过程保持耐心和积极态度。Andrew 表示这些技巧很实用，若有机会为 Toby 打理毛发就会记住这些。Audrey 回应说没问题，很高兴技巧对他有帮助，并表示如果他尝试，请告诉她，她可以提供更多建议。
[August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM] Audrey: Hi Andrew! Audrey said: I can't wait for the pics. My dogs will be waiting too. An image shared by Audrey shows two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth.

【Toby】Session Date: July 11, 2023. July 11, 2023, 10:05 AM: Andrew introduces Toby, his puppy, a joyful addition he could not resist bringing home in city living; an image of a dog sitting on a leash indoors was shared. Audrey acknowledges Toby's adorableness and congratulates Andrew on the new addition, expressing happiness. July 11, 2023, 10:05 AM: Andrew states Toby brings a lot of joy; since the last talk, work has been piling up and he has been stuck inside, and he misses the peace and freedom that comes with going for a hike. 【Dog Tags】July 11, 2023, 10:05 AM: Audrey stated she is in for the hike and that her dogs can come; she had made personalized wooden keychains with engraved names for them and shared an image of them. Andrew asked if she made them; Audrey answered that she made them herself and wanted each to be special and fit their personalities. Andrew commented, "Wow, those look great! Did you make them? It's really cool!" Audrey replied, "Thanks! Yeah, I made them myself. I wanted each one to be special and fit their personalities." Andrew added, "Wow, that's so cool. You really put so much love into making them, which makes them extra special." Audrey stated, "Thanks! I did put a lot of love into making these tags. I want my pets to feel seen and loved." Andrew observed, "It really are the small things like these show we care a ton about out pets." Audrey concluded, "Yep! Small acts of love like that make a big difference in our relationships with our furry pals. Let's make sure they know how much we care!" 【Hiking Plans】On July 11, 2023 at 10:05 AM, Audrey noted that work has been non-stop and stressful, making it hard to get outdoors, and stated that hiking is a great way to relax and take in nature, proposing to plan a trip for both of them and their pups. Andrew replied that work has been stressful lately and he needs a break; he has plans for a hike next month and suggested that Audrey and the pups could come along so they can enjoy nature and have a fun time, adding that dogs bring them so much joy and it's only fair to show them how special they are, and that he can't wait for the hike and for Toby and Audrey's pups to meet. Audrey then said she can't wait either; it's going to be loads of fun and a great memory. Andrew concluded that it'll be an adventure. Audrey said she's counting down the days until the hike and needs to get them ready soon. Andrew echoed that it's going to be awesome and said let's talk later.

5.gold_answer: They definitely prefer nice, sunny days in the grass.

memories.memory:
【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。
[October 28, 2023, 02:36 PM] Audrey: Hey Andrew, I

【Audrey's Dogs – Hiking & Safety】On May 03, 2023 at 05:41 PM, Audrey stated that not much has changed since they last talked; she is busy taking care of her pets and spending time with them, and finds it fulfilling; Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on top of a lush green field. Andrew asked whether Audrey's dogs enjoy going on hikes. Audrey stated that her dogs go nuts on hikes; they love exploring new scents and being in nature—it's their happy place; she can tell by their wagging tails and expressions how much they love it; it's so great to see them having so much fun; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog running in a field with other dogs. Andrew asked for tips or tricks for keeping dogs safe when they're out and about. Audrey stated that safety is super important for me; she even got them something special; they sure look funny, but it works; Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog with a leash and shoes on. 【Audrey's Walks – Fetch & Socials】Session Date: May 03, 2023. May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Awesome to see that you take such good care of your dogs! What else do you do when you walk them? Audrey: When I take them out, we usually play fetch with a ball or frisbee. They love chasing it! We also meet other dog owners in the park and have a doggie playdate. It's a great way for me to chat with people and for them to make new friends. [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a dog catching a frisbee in a field] May 03, 2023, 05:41 PM: Andrew: Wow, looks like fun! They sure look excited about playing fetch! Audrey: They absolutely adore it! They have tons of energy and love meeting new pals at playdates. Plus, they always get excited when I bring those out. [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog wearing a party hat sitting on a couch] 【Audrey's Playdates & Dog Park】会话日期：2023年5月3日，时间：17:41。Andrew 问：它们是否喜欢戴派对帽？以及你从哪里找到它们的玩耍约会。Audrey 回答：帽子并不打扰它们，它们戴帽子只是为了好玩和得到零食。狗公园是一个很好的起点，它们可以在那儿奔跑并与其他狗狗互动，是玩耍约会的有趣地点。Audrey 分享的图片：一张狗跳过公园环的照片。Andrew 问：它位于哪里？Audrey 回答：就在我们通常散步的公园旁边，那里有很多树和长椅，便于我们观看狗狗玩耍。Andrew 表示：那也不算太远吧！我得去看看。 【Audrey & Andrew – Closing Chat】Audrey and Andrew – Closing Chat; Session Date: May 03, 2023. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Audrey: Yup! Not at all! Let me know how it goes. At 05:41 PM on May 03, 2023, Andrew: Sure, I'll let you know. Always great chatting with you! Ttyl.

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Luckily I caught her before anything bad happened. Little moments like this remind me how important she is and how we should be careful when we're out there." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of a red retractable leash with a black handle. Andrew: "Oh man, sorry to hear that! I'm totally getting anxious just thinking about my dog getting lost. Precious must have been really scared. What did you do to calm her down?" Audrey: "I petted and hugged her, spoke calmly, and slowly walked her to relax. Our bond feels even stronger when moments like these show up." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying on a bed with its head on the pillow. Andrew: "She looks so adorable! That's the connection I'd like to have with Toby. Any advice on creating a strong relationship with dogs?" An image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog running in a field with a frisbee. Audrey: "Building trust with them needs patience and regular training. Give them time and love, and praise their successes." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs wearing birthday hats and sitting next to each other. Andrew: "Thanks for the tips! Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" An image shared by Andrew: a photo of a dog sitting on a sidewalk in a garden. Audrey: "Thanks! We work on obedience and teach them tricks like sit, stay, shake, and roll over. It's fun and rewarding for both of us." An image shared by Audrey: a photo of a group of dogs sitting on a chair. Andrew: "Must be great having them around, the bond between you and them is awesome." Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." An image shared by Audrey: a photography of three dogs sitting on a couch with a laptop in the background. Andrew: "That's such a lovely picture, Audrey! So cute to see them snuggled up, having fun together. They really bring so much joy to our lives." Audrey: "They really do, bringing loads of love and happiness. They are everything to me." 【Dog Breeds】On September 24, 2023, at 05:53 PM, Andrew asked what breeds the dogs are, noting that breeds might affect bonding. Audrey stated that all four dogs are mutts: two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that some dog breeds bond better than others. Audrey shared an image of a group of dogs tied to a leash on a brick walkway. Audrey then shared an image of three small dogs sitting on a couch with white fur. Andrew asked whether there are any other furry pals they play with, or just the ones Audrey has. Audrey answered: Just my fur babies, and shared an image of a dog and a teddy bear sleeping on a couch. 【Walks】September 24, 2023, 05:53 PM: Andrew asked Audrey, "Wow, teaching them tricks must be super fun! How often do you take them for walks?" Audrey replied, "Very often, multiple times a day even, it's a great exercise for them and great bonding time for us." [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs sitting next to each other on a beach]

【Audrey: Training Progress】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Audrey states she is taking a dog training course; it is challenging but rewarding, and her dogs are doing better already. At 08:32 PM, Andrew says that's great news; it must feel so rewarding to see them doing well; he understands how it feels on missing the peace of being out on the trails, but for now, it's just urban adventures then. At 08:32 PM, Audrey states that seeing them do well is super rewarding; they give me so much love and happiness; she gets how frustrating it can be not to find pet-friendly spots; nature is so calming and restorative with them around; see how happy they are when they're out. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth. 【Dog-friendly Spots】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew stated that he still can't find any dog-friendly spots to rent. Audrey stated at 08:32 PM that she hasn't had a ton of time for new trails either; the dog-training course has been a big time sink but it's paid off because they're doing great. 【Breeds: Jack Russell & Chihuahua】On July 3, 2023, at 08:32 PM, Andrew asked what breed the dogs are and what they enjoy doing the most. Audrey replied that they're all mutts, with two Jack Russell mixes and two Chihuahua mixes, and that they love running and playing fetch; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs curled up in a dog bed. 【Doggy Playdates】Session Date: July 03, 2023. At 08:32 PM, Andrew observed that they look comfy in that bed and are clearly well loved, and asked how old they are and how they are getting along. Audrey replied that they're all 3-year-old and they are a great pack; they had a doggy playdate last Friday, and it was a bit crazy but still lots of fun; an image shared by Audrey shows two dogs laying on a couch with a blanket. At 08:32 PM, Andrew commented that they look adorable, doggy playdates sound like a lot of fun, and that he is glad they all get along. 【Audrey: Personal Update】On July 03, 2023 at 08:32 PM, Audrey said: "They really are my universe." She asked: "What about anything new you've been into lately?"

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Pepper loves lounging on the couch; Pixie curls up in her bed; Precious has her chair; Panda relaxes on his rug; each dog has a cozy spot. Andrew posted an image of Toby at his favorite spot. Audrey shared a photo of two dogs snuggling on her favorite blanket. Andrew asked if they always sleep like that; Audrey confirmed that they do, cuddling up together especially when napping, and that they are best friends. Andrew said it must be great to have furry friends to keep each other company; Audrey replied that they are always there for each other and seeing them together makes her happy. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). Audrey asked for the pup's name. Andrew said they decided on 'Scout' for their pup, as it seemed perfect for their adventurous spirit. Audrey asked what Scout's first adventure would be. Andrew said they would take Scout, Toby, and Buddy to a nearby park; it's not big, but they can all have fun and get some fresh air. Audrey advised starting small and gradually exposing Scout, and to keep them leashed; she shared an image of a dog running with a tennis ball in its mouth. Andrew replied that safety first; for now, they're keeping the new addition on a leash while they get used to being outside; he commented that the photo of Audrey's dog at the park is cute. He noted they bought essentials for Scout's comfort and entertainment, including a bed, toys, and some puppy pads, making Scout their own little safe haven. Audrey responded that it's great they're creating a safe and fun space for Scout, emphasizing the importance of a secure space and slowly introducing Scout to Toby and Buddy, noting it takes time for pups to get used to each other, and that Scout is lucky to have you and your girlfriend. Andrew thanked them and said they feel lucky to have Scout; it's been amazing having so many furry friends; he asked how Audrey's dogs are doing now. Andrew concluded that dogs are great and are always there for us, and that they should count themselves lucky to have such amazing furry friends as family member. 【Audrey's Dogs】Session Date: November 22, 2023. At 09:02 AM, Audrey states that the dogs are doing great, exploring and meeting new people; they feel loved and safe; she is glad they're part of her life and grateful to have them as part of her family; they are really awesome and bring so much joy and friendship. At 09:02 AM, Andrew states that's great to hear; dogs truly bring joy and friendship; he is glad they're happy with you.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Audrey agreed that German Shepherds are awesome, very loyal and smart, and that you will have an amazing connection with one. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew stated that having a like-minded hiking partner would be great and asked for advice for city-dwellers who own a pup. Audrey advised ensuring you have enough time and energy for a pup, as they need lots of attention and walks, especially for a German Shepherd like Toby, who will need to offset a lot of energy. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

【Audrey-Andrew Catch-Up】March 27, 2023, 01:10 PM: Audrey and Andrew exchanged messages. Andrew started a new job last week as a Financial Analyst, a change from his previous job. Audrey congratulated him on the new job and said she got new collars and tags for her dogs, which she described as so cute. 【Dogs and Pets】Session Date: March 27, 2023. At 01:10 PM, Andrew asked to see a picture; Audrey provided an image showing two dogs standing in the grass with their mouths open and wearing new collars. He asked their names and how long she had them; she has had them for 3 years and their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda, and she can't live without her little ones. He asked if she had always wanted a dog despite living in the city and whether they can go on adventures; she answered that they are city dogs and explore all the time, loving new parks and trails, and going on adventures together very often. He said they sound awesome and expressed jealousy about the outings. She said they really do bring happiness. He asked if she has any pets; she replied No, no pets right now, but she loves animals. She concluded: That's great to hear; animals are truly amazing. Do you have a favorite animal?

【Nature】[Nature]
[Session Date: October 06, 2023]

On October 06, 2023 at 09:41 PM, Audrey described missing nature due to a knee injury that prevented walking her dogs; the dogs bring her joy; the picture was taken after she started walking again, and she felt great to be back out there. The image shows two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth. Andrew responded that it feels bad not being able to take them for a stroll; they must have been over the moon when you could finally take them out again; he expressed appreciation for the adorable picture, noting that dogs are awesome like that, and added, "Remind us to stop and smell the roses." Audrey replied that it was like they couldn't wait; they remind us to appreciate life's little pleasures, and they see the world so differently.

【Dog Grooming】在 2023 年 8 月 19 日 21:19，Audrey 与 Andrew 就 Audrey 的狗狗美容进展展开对话。Audrey 表示八月很有事件性，她学会了新技能，开始自行为狗狗进行护理，确保它们被宠爱且开心，完成后它们看起来很可爱。她还发送了 grooming 完成后的照片，照片显示一只狗站在房间的桌子上，看起来柔软蓬松。Andrew 夸赞她的照护并请求再看一张 grooming 后的照片。Audrey 发送照片，指它们看起来又软又蓬松。Andrew 问她是如何做到如此出色，他说一直想学习狗狗美容但从未有时间。Audrey 回答说她参加过狗狗美容课程，学到了很多技巧，并问是否愿意听些技巧。Andrew 表示当然，愿意听。Audrey 给出技巧：grooming 要慢而温和，关注耳朵和爪子等敏感部位，并在整个过程保持耐心和积极态度。Andrew 表示这些技巧很实用，若有机会为 Toby 打理毛发就会记住这些。Audrey 回应说没问题，很高兴技巧对他有帮助，并表示如果他尝试，请告诉她，她可以提供更多建议。
[August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM] Audrey: Hi Andrew! The 【Park Walk】Park Walk。会话日期：August 19, 2023。2023年8月19日 09:19 PM，Audrey：我正带它们出去公园散步——它们很喜欢，且这对我们来说是很好的锻炼。你周末有什么计划？ 【Puppy Photos】Session Date: August 19, 2023; Timestamp: August 19, 2023, 09:19 PM; Speaker: Audrey. Audrey said: I can't wait for the pics. My dogs will be waiting too. An image shared by Audrey shows two dogs running in a field with a ball in their mouth.

5.mflow_response: No memories mention snow response.

5.question: What kind of experiences are Audrey's dogs the best companions for?

【Dogs】2023年10月13日04:22 PM，Andrew 与 Audrey 的对话中包含以下要点：上周二（2023年10月10日），Andrew 和他的女友 Toby 一起度过了一个很棒的夜晚，玩桌游。Audrey 最近做了一些甜点，感谢邻居的狗友好环境，并问周末有何计划。Audrey 问能否带她的狗来，Andrew 表示不确定是否适合，但附近有一个很棒的狗公园，或许还能把咖啡带过去。Audrey 说狗公园对它们来说像天堂，喜欢和其他狗社交并大量运动，看到它们奔跑和嗅闻一切很可爱。Andrew 回忆道：有一次他的狗过于兴奋，追着松鼠在树周围奔跑，松鼠从树枝上观看，场面很搞笑。Audrey 问他的狗的品种，他说 Toby 是 German Shephard，且喜欢穿可爱的毛衣，非常活跃，并问对方的狗在公园喜欢玩哪些游戏。Audrey 回答她的狗最爱 Fetch 与 Frisbee，喜欢奔跑、结识其他狗，甚至可以跑好几个小时。Andrew 表示这听起来很有趣，看到它们快乐、活跃让人感到欣慰。Audrey 说看到它们快乐会让她心里充满喜悦，觉得它们带来无条件的爱；她还提到自己曾有四只狗的纹身，后来去纹身店在纹身上又添加了一些图案。Andrew 问她是否还会再养新狗或再纹身，Audrey 回答现在已经够了，除非未来某天决定再养一只狗，那时可能再纹一次。Andrew 指出这些狗确实是她的情感来源，给予灵感，他们也会被像这样的地方所启发；他提到一张路在树林中的照片作为灵感来源。Audrey 表示它们确实给她带来快乐，体验无条件的爱是美好的，并问 Andrew 是否有机会去像这样的森林散步，可能是一次很棒的逃离。Andrew 回应说他们与狗一起徒步是增进关系、创造回忆的有趣方式，Audrey 也表示她仍记得每次大家和狗一起走在徒步路上时的美好时光。

【Nature Hike】[Nature Hike]
[Session Date: May 11, 2023]

[May 11, 2023, 02:03 PM] Audrey stated, "That hike sounds great. Nature is good for the soul, right?" Her week was good; taking care of her four doggies and ensuring their happiness and health took up most of her free time. Image shared by Audrey: a photograph of a group of dogs with a yellow circle. 【Dog Training Workshop】On May 11, 2023 at 02:03 PM, Andrew and Audrey discussed a Dog Training Workshop. Audrey saw a flyer for a positive reinforcement training class at her local pet store; a volunteer in the store allowed her to meet their dog, which was friendly and playful. Andrew noted that positive reinforcement can help bond with dogs and asked whether they'll catch on quickly. Audrey replied that they'll catch on quickly; they're quick learners and love rewards; she can't wait to learn how to train them better. Andrew asked to be updated on their progress. Audrey said she would keep updates on how it goes and how her pups are doing, hoping they'll be extra behaved, and that she'll share tips on training a future dog as well. Andrew thanked her and said he's excited to hear about it and to have a great time at the workshop. Audrey said she'll definitely have a good time and that this is a must learn for any dog owner. Andrew remarked that she might be a good salesperson because he's almost sold on the class. Audrey stated that it's important for pets to learn to behave on a positive reinforcement way; punishment is never the proper way for pets ya know? Andrew said he wouldn't want to be punished, let alone puppies and dogs. Audrey added she doesn't want to hurt any of her dogs; thinking about it gives her pain. Andrew said he would look into their classes and talk soon.

【Park & Dog Owners Group】[Park & Dog Owners Group]
[Session Date: November 04, 2023]

[November 04, 2023, 07:59 PM] Andrew: Andrew and his girlfriend went on a bike ride and stumbled upon a park outside of town; it was awesome to get away from the city and be surrounded by nature. [Image shared by Andrew: a photo of two people riding bikes on a paved path]

【Audrey's Dogs】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Audrey reported that she had gotten a tattoo of her four dogs on her arm to have them with her wherever she goes; four dogs are enough for now because they keep her busy and each dog deserves attention; she had taken all four dogs to the vet for checkups, describing the trip as havoc and noting that next time she will bring them one by one; an image shows a person with a tattoo on their hand. Andrew stated that pets bring joy and feel like family and that he can't imagine life without them. Audrey said pets are family and that it is sweet to see their connection; she shared a photo of herself lying on the grass with them. Andrew said the photo was great and that it looked like they had a really good time outside. Audrey replied that it was a great day with tons of fun outside; Andrew encouraged cherishing those memories; Audrey concluded that she will always cherish those moments as they make life brighter. 【Farm Veggies】On August 16, 2023, at 09:58 PM, Andrew stated that he recently went to a farm with his girlfriend to get some fresh veggies for dinner, and it was really nice; he asked whether you have been thinking about getting more fur babies or if four is enough.

【Scout】On November 22, 2023, at 09:02 AM, Andrew stated that they haven't had the chance to take their dogs to the groomer yet but will do so soon, and that he can't help himself but to adpot another dog the other day; he shared a photo of the dog (image: a photo of a woman feeding a dog hay in a barn). 【Audrey's dogs】2023年10月28日，Audrey 向 Andrew 说明她的狗狗出现异常行为，已在上周三为它们预约了动物行为学家，过程有些忙乱，但希望这能帮助她更好地了解它们。Andrew 表示关切，询问它们是否仍然不正常、预约情况如何，以及是否获得了有用的建议或见解。Audrey 回应称预约还算可以，起初有些忙乱，行为学家检查了它们并提出一些现在可以尝试的应对方法。Andrew 继续追问获得了哪些建议，以及她将如何帮助解决问题。Audrey 说行为学家给出处理建议并建议改变它们的日常作息，她正在使用正向强化技术，仍在推进中，但有希望。Andrew 对正向强化表示肯定，并询问新方法的执行情况。Audrey 回答到目前为止它们对新方法反应良好，虽然不会立刻解决问题，但有进展，希望继续保持。Andrew 表示很高兴听到，并鼓励坚持。Audrey 感谢并说这对她意义重大，尽管困难但她致力于让它们健康快乐，它们对她意义重大。Andrew 评价说她做得很好，它们很幸运有她。Audrey 表示谢谢，强调它们对她非常特别，并希望它们都好起来，此外附上一张去年夏天它们玩得很开心的照片，照片中是两只狗在田野里奔跑，嘴里叼着球，图片由 Audrey 分享。Audrey 还说：“去年夏天它们玩得很开心”，并期待有一天它们都能恢复正常。Andrew 也称赞它们看起来玩得很开心，问它们的品种，并祝福她和它们一切顺利。Audrey 最后说它们都是混血犬，但 Pepper 和 Panda 是拉布拉多混血，Precious 和 Pixie 是吉娃娃混血，并再次表达希望它们尽快恢复正常。

【Dog Bonding】Session Date: September 24, 2023. At 05:53 PM, Andrew: "Hey Audrey! Long time no talk! How have you been?" Audrey: "Hey! I'm alright. Had some bumps though - last Friday at the park one of my pups saw something and pulled so hard the leash busted. Scared that she might run off and get hurt, so I had to chase after her. Patience and practice are important for establishing a bond with our pooches, just like any other meaningful relationship. I guess some dogs just need more time! It must be so satisfying to see those successes and progress. Oh, and your pup looks so sharp in that green hat! Is there anything specific you do with them to work on training?" Audrey: "Yeah, they do! They make everything so much better. Can't imagine life without them. They mean everything to me." 【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Audrey affirmed that German Shepherds are loyal and smart, noting they love new journeys and would love exploring the outside with you; she can totally see you and your pup conquering trails together; an image shows a dog on a trail with a view of a city. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough. Audrey replied that it's important to be prepared and give a pup the love it deserves, wishing good luck with Toby. Andrew concluded by saying he needs to take Toby out for a small hike at the local trail. 【Audrey's Agility】Session Date: August 04, 2023. At 11:05 AM, Audrey started agility classes with her pups at a dog park, stating it is awesome to watch them learn and build relationships with other dogs, and to see them face and conquer challenges; [Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog in a field of flowers and grass]. At 11:05 AM, Andrew said it is amazing to watch them grow together and that they look cool overcoming obstacles; [Image shared by Andrew: a photography of a dog jumping through a ring in the air]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey added that they've come a long way, they have so much fun with it, it's a great physical and mental workout, and she takes them to the park twice a week for practice — it's been a great bonding experience; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a group of dogs sitting on a dirt road]. At 11:05 AM, Audrey stated that it's been tough at times, but overall it's going great and they're all growing together; check out this pic of us on a trail hike; [Image shared by Audrey: a photography of a woman walking her dogs down a path]. 【Audrey's Nature Walks】[Audrey's Nature Walks] [Session Date: August 04, 2023] At 11:05 AM on August 04, 2023, Andrew noted that Audrey is having fun with them and keeping them busy, shared a photo of a dirt path in the woods with rocks and trees, and asked how long the trail was. Audrey replied that the hike took two hours, was stunning, with lots of amazing views, and was great to explore nature. Andrew said being in nature and appreciating it is cool and he wishes to do that more often. Audrey asked if there are any outdoor activities you enjoy lately. Andrew stated that hiking is the best; being out in nature with trees and fresh air refreshes him; reaching the top of a challenging trail is amazing and it feels like all worries vanish when you get to the top. Audrey agreed that it feels like an achievement and that worries fade away, calling nature pretty special. Andrew said nature really calms him down and relaxes his mind, a break from the craziness of city living. Audrey described nature as a refuge from busy city life and noted it is even better when shared with someone special; her pets have been good buddies during tough times, making her happy and loved. Andrew agreed that sharing something you enjoy with someone is great and that such bonds bring joy and love. Audrey stated that humans and animals have a cool connection, they bring joy and love, and she is blessed to have her furry friends as companions who always make her day better. Image shared by Audrey: a photo of a dog laying in a dog bed in a living room.

[Session Date: June 02, 2023]

【Beach】Session Date: October 04, 2023. At 04:18 PM, Andrew asked Audrey how the dogs enjoyed the beach and water and shared an image: a photo of a person walking on the beach with a surfboard. Audrey replied that the dogs had a blast swimming at the beach and asked if he had been there lately. Andrew admitted he hadn't been to the beach in a while, misses being outdoors, and finds it hard to find open spaces in the city; he used to hike a lot, but it's more challenging now with his work life balance. Audrey responded that that's rough and she can imagine how much he misses being outdoors and surrounded by nature. Andrew added that it's been tough; exploring nature was his escape, a way to find peace, but with his job and living there it's harder to get that feeling back, and he feels a void in his heart.

【Toby the German Shepherd】On August 04, 2023, at 11:05 AM, Andrew told Audrey that he and his girlfriend and Toby are going camping this weekend, noting it's been forever since he has been in nature; an image shared by Andrew shows a woman setting up a tent on a rocky hill. He said they're pretty lucky to have Audrey as their owner and expressed hope to one day have a bond with Toby as deep as theirs. Audrey replied that Toby and the other dog(s) mean the world to her and asked what breed Toby is. Andrew answered that Toby is a German Shepherd, noting they are smart and loyal, and asked for her thoughts. Andrew said he hopes so and that he should take him hiking with him, as they would be great hiking buddies; an image shows a dog sitting on a rock in the woods. Andrew thanked her, said he would keep that in mind, and that he wants to make sure he's not limiting Toby's growth but not taking him out not enough.
